name: Search Everywhere Optimization
summary: Optimizing content for discovery across all platforms where people search, not just traditional search engines like Google.
explanation:
Search Everywhere Optimization is the strategy of optimizing content for discovery across every platform where people search for information—not just Google. As search behavior fragments across multiple platforms, limiting optimization to traditional search engines means missing where audiences actually look for information.

People now search on: AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity), social media (TikTok, Instagram, Reddit, LinkedIn), video platforms (YouTube), audio platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts), marketplaces (Amazon, Etsy), app stores, community platforms (Discord, Slack), and code repositories (GitHub). Each platform has its own algorithm, ranking factors, and content formats. Gen Z in particular uses TikTok and Instagram as primary search tools for restaurants, products, tutorials, and travel.

Search Everywhere Optimization requires understanding platform-specific discovery mechanics. YouTube prioritizes watch time and engagement. TikTok rewards trending sounds and hook-driven content. Reddit values authentic, helpful responses. LinkedIn favors thought leadership and professional insights. Amazon optimizes for purchase intent signals. Each demands tailored content and optimization strategies.

The approach goes beyond repurposing content across platforms—it requires native content creation that respects each platform's culture, format, and algorithm. A blog post cannot simply be posted to TikTok; it needs to be reimagined as a short, visually engaging video that hooks viewers in the first second.

For businesses and creators, Search Everywhere Optimization means: auditing where your target audience actually searches, creating platform-native content for each discovery channel, building consistent brand presence across platforms, and measuring visibility and engagement across the entire discovery ecosystem rather than just organic search traffic.
